mission: Extract Cammarota CMP85 theorem and map its smallness threshold to CMP116 Eq. (2.29) D-family summability.
target_shape: sum_D prod_Y alpha6*exp(-delta*kappa*d_k(Y)) <= 1 under explicit thresholds.
minimal_success: DIndex/DParts dictionary remains explicit if unresolved
reject_if: sufficiently large/small converted to constants without source
Cammarota reference list used as theorem text
